name: Dim 07 — Synergy quantification methodology
what_it_solves: Full moat_comparison dimension #7: 'Synergy quantification methodology' — Bev2026 approach vs CrisPRO approach with verbatim quote.
how_it_solves: Extracted verbatim from moat_comparison.comparison_dimensions[i]; raw dict carried in attributes.raw.
why_it_exists: Depth pass: previous stream flattened each dimension to a few fields. This entity carries every field the JSON contains for that dimension.

attributes.Bev2026_approach_verbatim: Synergy was calculated with two models (HSA and Bliss) using SynergyFinder 3.1, and HSA synergy scores and summary synergy scores with 95% confidence interval for the CCK-8 experiments are shown.
attributes.CrisPRO_approach: CrisPRO does not currently perform wet-lab synergy quantification — relies on GDSC2 single-agent IC50 / AUC + DepMap CRISPR dependency for axis ranking.
attributes.moat_status: Bev2026 ADVANTAGE on wet-lab synergy measurement methodology. CrisPRO can offer in-silico drug-combination ranking via GDSC2 axis pairing (e.g., ATR-inhibitor × cytidine-analog combination predictions for MBD4-LOF), but does not generate primary synergy scores.

raw.Bev2026_approach_verbatim: Synergy was calculated with two models (HSA and Bliss) using SynergyFinder 3.1, and HSA synergy scores and summary synergy scores with 95% confidence interval for the CCK-8 experiments are shown.
raw.Bev2026_software_note: Paper uses SynergyFinder 3.1, but cites reference 21 (Ianevski et al. 2022 Nucleic Acids Res 50:W739-W743) which is the SynergyFinder 3.0 publication. The 3.1 release apparently postdates the original publication and is referenced by version number only in the figure caption.
raw.CrisPRO_approach: CrisPRO does not currently perform wet-lab synergy quantification — relies on GDSC2 single-agent IC50 / AUC + DepMap CRISPR dependency for axis ranking.
raw.moat_status: Bev2026 ADVANTAGE on wet-lab synergy measurement methodology. CrisPRO can offer in-silico drug-combination ranking via GDSC2 axis pairing (e.g., ATR-inhibitor × cytidine-analog combination predictions for MBD4-LOF), but does not generate primary synergy scores.
raw.complementary_value: If CrisPRO computational ranking nominates a combination, Bev2026's published HSA/Bliss methodology with 95% CI is the reproducible gold-standard for wet-lab validation.

verbatim_evidence.quote: Synergy was calculated with two models (HSA and Bliss) using SynergyFinder 3.1, and HSA synergy scores and summary synergy scores with 95% confidence interval for the CCK-8 experiments are shown.
verbatim_evidence.note: verbatim quote from Bev2026 PDF as recorded at file creation time
